identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a trustworthy, organic, and professional fintech experience that feels like a community, not a bank.

primary.description: Deep Forest Green - Represents stability, money, and growth.

secondary.description: Earthy Gold/Terracotta - Warmth and human connection.

accent.description: Cloud Grey - Soft background for high contrast.

background.description: Pure White for clarity, Alabaster for sections.

headings.usage: Use for all H1-H6. Tight tracking (-0.02em).

body.usage: Use for all paragraphs, labels, and data tables. Excellent readability.

border_radius.description: Generous rounding. Cards get 'rounded-xl' or 'rounded-2xl'. Buttons 'rounded-full' or 'rounded-lg'.

textures.noise: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-full px-8 py-3 shadow-soft transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-primary border border-gray-200 hover:bg-gray-50 rounded-full px-6 py-2 shadow-sm
buttons.ghost: text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-100 hover:text-gray-900 rounded-lg px-4 py-2

cards.dashboard: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-gray-100 shadow-card p-6 hover:shadow-hover transition-shadow duration-300
cards.tontine_listing: bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-200 p-5 flex flex-col gap-4 hover:border-primary/30 transition-colors

inputs.default: bg-gray-50 border-transparent focus:bg-white focus:border-primary focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 rounded-lg h-12 px-4 transition-all placeholder:text-gray-400

charts.style: Clean, minimal axis lines, rounded bar ends, soft gradients for area charts.

grids_and_layouts.dashboard_bento: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6 auto-rows-min
grids_and_layouts.marketing_hero: flex flex-col lg:flex-row items-center justify-between gap-12 py-20 px-6 max-w-7xl mx-auto
grids_and_layouts.form_layout: max-w-md mx-auto space-y-6 bg-white p-8 rounded-2xl shadow-lg border border-gray-100

image_urls.description: Group of smiling students/friends - representing community tontine members.
Green plant in clear cup - conceptual image for savings growth.
Minimalist padlock - use for security features section.
Silver coin on hand - represents contribution/payout.
Happy professional woman - user profile or testimonial.

3d_libraries.usage: Use Framer Motion for smooth page transitions and micro-interactions on cards. Avoid heavy 3D for this financial app to maintain trust and speed. Use SVG icons with motion instead.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use the specified Google Fonts (Manrope, Public Sans). update index.css to import them.
Implement the 'Bento Grid' for the User Dashboard.
Ensure 'Tontine Creation' flow is broken into steps (Wizard pattern) for clarity.
Apply the noise texture as a subtle overlay on the Landing Page hero section only.
STRICTLY follow the color palette. Do not use default Tailwind blue.
Translate interface text to French by default (or provide toggle), as target is French-speaking.
Mock KYC process with a clean, trustworthy file upload interface.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) sparingly (e.g., sticky nav).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
